Plugins describe runtime extension intent. GitClaw treats plugin specs as reviewed metadata only: no plugin is installed, no package manager is invoked, no MCP server is connected, and no plugin, issue, comment, config, or provider payload body is printed by this report.

### Runtime Boundary
- plugin packages are not installed by `gitclaw handle`
- plugin runtimes, MCP servers, webhooks, and channel bridges are not started
- executable-looking plugin files are reported as ignored metadata, not run
- future executable plugins require reviewed workflows, explicit permissions, approval gates, and body-free audit cards
